// TestSheet DSL fixture
// Line 2: event sheet header
Event: On start of layout
  Action: Set variable alpha to 10
  Action: Set variable beta to 20
Event: On button clicked
  Condition: alpha > 5
  Action: Call function heroAttack
Event: Every tick
  Action: Update display score
  Condition: score > 100
Event: On signal BattleStart
  Action: Set variable gamma to 0
  Action: Call function heroDefend
Event: On timer expired
  Condition: beta < 30
  Action: Set variable delta to alpha
Event: On layout end
  Action: Reset all variables
// End of TestSheet DSL
